summary: Iteration 110: Frontend-only testing for UX improvements - Navbar account area fix, MiraGuidance system, MyCelebrations widget, enhanced badge tooltips, and new animations. All features verified successfully.

verified_features.details: Shows 'Sign In' for guests (no confusing 'Account' dropdown). For logged-in users shows avatar + first name. Verified via UI test and code review at Navbar.jsx lines 586-604.
MiraGuidance.jsx exports MiraTip component with contextual guidance messages. Uses animate-bounce-slow animation. Integrated in MemberDashboard.jsx at line 883.
MyCelebrations.jsx shows upcoming pet birthdays/gotcha days with countdown. Shows 'No Celebrations Yet' state when no pets. Integrated in MemberDashboard.jsx at line 894.
GamificationBanner.jsx has enhanced tooltips showing badge name, description, and reward points (lines 225-238). Uses group-hover for tooltip display.
Onboarding shows 4 steps (1-2-3-4 progress indicator visible). Step 1 is Parent Info, Step 3 is Celebrations selection (verified in iteration 109).
tailwind.config.js has bounce-slow, bounce-gentle, wiggle, and confetti animations (lines 74-111).
Home page loads with updated navbar showing 'Sign In' for guests. All navigation pillars visible.

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - tested public pages and code review

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX improvements verified: 1) Navbar shows 'Sign In' for guests, avatar+name for logged-in users (no Account dropdown), 2) MiraTip component renders contextual guidance with bounce-slow animation, 3) MyCelebrations widget shows upcoming celebrations with countdown, 4) Badge tooltips show name/description/reward points on hover, 5) Onboarding has 4 steps with celebrations selection, 6) New animations (bounce-slow, bounce-gentle, wiggle, confetti) in tailwind.config.js
